interval.description: Data interval: m1=1min, m5=5min, m15=15min, m30=30min, h1=1hr, h2=2hr, h6=6hr, h12=12hr, d1=daily

days.description: Number of days of historical data to retrieve (1-30)

tools.name: assets-top
tools.description: Get the top cryptocurrencies ranked by market cap, with real-time price, 24-hour change percentage, and market cap for each asset.

limit.description: Number of top assets to return, ranked by market cap (1-50)

tools.name: analysis-technical
tools.description: Get the latest technical indicators for a cryptocurrency including SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, and VWAP to assess momentum, trend direction, and overbought/oversold conditions.

symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol or name (e.g. BTC or Bitcoin)

tools.name: market-rates
tools.description: Get USD-based conversion rates for fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies. Optionally pass a slug (e.g. 'euro', 'us-dollar', 'bitcoin') to look up a single rate.

slug.description: Optional: rate slug to fetch a single rate (e.g. 'us-dollar', 'euro', 'bitcoin')

tools.name: market-exchanges
tools.description: Get top cryptocurrency exchanges ranked by 24h volume. Optionally pass an exchangeId (e.g. 'binance', 'coinbase') to get details for a specific exchange including volume, trading pairs, and market share.

exchangeId.description: Optional: specific exchange ID to look up (e.g. 'binance', 'coinbase', 'kraken')

limit.description: Number of top exchanges to return when listing (1-50, default 10)

tools.name: assets-search
tools.description: Search for cryptocurrencies by name, symbol, or partial match. Returns multiple matching assets with their ID, name, symbol, rank, and current price.

query.description: Search query — cryptocurrency name, symbol, or partial match (e.g. "bit", "eth", "doge")

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-50, default 10)

tools.name: market-global
tools.description: Get a global overview of the cryptocurrency market including total market capitalization, 24-hour trading volume, Bitcoin dominance percentage, and the number of active cryptocurrencies.

tools.name: assets-compare
tools.description: Compare 2-5 cryptocurrencies side-by-side including price, 24h change, volume, market cap, and rank. Pass symbols as a comma-separated list (e.g. "BTC,ETH,SOL").

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of 2-5 cryptocurrency symbols or names to compare (e.g. "BTC,ETH,SOL")

tools.name: analysis-candlestick
tools.description: Get OHLCV candlestick data for a cryptocurrency. Useful for charting and technical analysis.

symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol or name (e.g. BTC or Bitcoin)

interval.description: Candle interval: m5=5min, m15=15min, m30=30min, h1=1hr, h2=2hr, h6=6hr, h12=12hr, d1=daily

days.description: Number of days of candlestick data to retrieve (1-30)

tools.name: price-convert
tools.description: Convert a cryptocurrency amount to any fiat currency (e.g. USD, EUR, JPY). Uses real-time exchange rates for accurate conversions.

symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol to convert from (e.g. BTC, ETH)

amount.description: Amount of the cryptocurrency to convert (default 1)

tools.name: assets-info
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a cryptocurrency including ID, rank, supply, max supply, VWAP, market cap, and 24h volume.

symbol.description: Cryptocurrency symbol or name (e.g. BTC or Bitcoin)

tools.name: calculate_net_salary
tools.description: Calcula o salário líquido CLT no Brasil com descontos de INSS e IRRF. Tabelas atualizadas 2026.

dependents.description: Número de dependentes para dedução IRRF

tools.name: calculate_compound_interest
tools.description: Calcula juros compostos com aportes mensais. Fórmula M = C × (1+i)^n com depósitos periódicos.

monthly_rate.description: Taxa de juros mensal (ex: 0.01 = 1% ao mês)

tools.name: calculate_installment
tools.description: Calcula parcelas de financiamento/empréstimo pelo sistema Price (parcelas fixas).

monthly_rate.description: Taxa de juros mensal (ex: 0.02 = 2% ao mês)

tools.name: calculate_severance
tools.description: Calcula rescisão trabalhista CLT — demissão sem justa causa, pedido de demissão ou acordo. Inclui saldo de salário, férias, 13º, aviso prévio, multa FGTS.

type.description: Tipo de rescisão

days_worked_in_month.description: Dias trabalhados no mês da rescisão

fgts_balance.description: Saldo do FGTS acumulado em R$

tools.name: calculate_financing
tools.description: Calcula financiamento imobiliário SAC ou Price. Parcelas, juros totais e valor total pago.

annual_rate.description: Taxa de juros anual (ex: 10 = 10% ao ano)

tools.name: calculate_investment_return
tools.description: Simula rendimento de renda fixa no Brasil — CDB, LCI, LCA, Tesouro Selic, Poupança. Calcula IR regressivo e compara com poupança.

type.description: Tipo de investimento

tools.name: calculate_mei_tax
tools.description: Calcula o valor do DAS MEI mensal e verifica se está dentro do limite de faturamento.

tools.name: calculate_overtime
tools.description: Calcula valor de horas extras CLT — 50% (dias úteis) e 100% (domingos/feriados).

tools.name: calculate_vacation_pay
tools.description: Calcula férias CLT — valor das férias + 1/3 constitucional + abono pecuniário, com desconto de INSS.

tools.name: calculate_thirteenth_salary
tools.description: Calcula o décimo terceiro salário — 1ª parcela, 2ª parcela com descontos de INSS e IRRF.

tools.name: calculate_budget
tools.description: Calcula orçamento pela regra 50/30/20 — necessidades, desejos e investimentos a partir da renda líquida.

tools.name: calculate_financial_independence
tools.description: Calcula quanto você precisa acumular para viver de renda (independência financeira) usando a regra dos 4% ou taxa personalizada.

monthly_investment.description: Quanto investe por mês em R$

annual_return.description: Retorno real anual esperado (% acima da inflação, padrão 8%)

withdrawal_rate.description: Taxa de retirada anual segura (%, padrão 4%)

tools.name: compare_clt_vs_pj
tools.description: Compara renda líquida CLT vs PJ (Simples Nacional) para o mesmo valor bruto. Inclui benefícios CLT e custos PJ.

pj_accountant.description: Custo mensal do contador em R$

tools.name: calculate_opportunity_cost
tools.description: Calcula quanto um gasto recorrente viraria se fosse investido. Ex: café de R$10/dia → quanto dá em 10 anos investido.

tools.name: calculate_inflation_adjustment
tools.description: Corrige um valor pela inflação (IPCA). Mostra quanto um valor do passado equivale hoje, ou quanto o poder de compra diminuiu.

tools.name: calculate_emergency_fund
tools.description: Calcula o valor ideal da reserva de emergência e quanto tempo leva para montar, baseado nos gastos mensais e perfil.

current_savings.description: Quanto já tem guardado em R$

monthly_saving.description: Quanto consegue guardar por mês em R$

tools.name: calculate_debt_payoff
tools.description: Calcula plano de quitação de dívidas pelo método avalanche (maior juros primeiro) ou bola de neve (menor saldo primeiro). Compara os dois.

extra_payment.description: Valor extra mensal além dos mínimos em R$

tools.name: calculate_real_salary
tools.description: Calcula o salário real descontando a inflação. Mostra se o reajuste acompanhou o IPCA ou se houve perda de poder de compra.

tools.name: calculate_fgts
tools.description: Calcula saldo do FGTS, rendimento, saque-aniversário e multa rescisória de 40%. Atualizado 2026.

tools.name: calculate_unemployment_insurance
tools.description: Calcula valor e parcelas do seguro-desemprego 2026 com base no salário e tempo trabalhado.

average_salary.description: Média dos últimos 3 salários em R$

times_requested.description: Quantas vezes já solicitou (1ª, 2ª ou 3ª vez)

tools.name: calculate_credit_card_interest
tools.description: Calcula juros do crédito rotativo do cartão e compara com parcelamento da fatura. Mostra o custo real de pagar o mínimo.

bill_amount.description: Valor total da fatura em R$

revolving_rate.description: Taxa de juros rotativo mensal (%, padrão 14%)

installment_rate.description: Taxa de juros do parcelamento mensal (%, padrão 8%)

tools.name: calculate_simples_nacional
tools.description: Calcula imposto do Simples Nacional por faixa de faturamento e anexo. Alíquota efetiva e valor mensal.

tools.name: calculate_employee_cost
tools.description: Calcula o custo total de um funcionário CLT para a empresa — encargos, FGTS, 13º, férias, provisões.

plano_saude.description: Plano de saúde mensal em R$

tools.name: calculate_rent_vs_buy
tools.description: Compara alugar vs comprar imóvel considerando custo de oportunidade, valorização e custos totais.

financing_rate.description: Taxa de juros anual do financiamento (%)

investment_return.description: Retorno anual se investir a entrada (%)

tools.name: calculate_car_ownership_cost
tools.description: Calcula o custo mensal real de ter um carro — IPVA, seguro, combustível, manutenção, depreciação, estacionamento.

car_value.description: Valor FIPE do carro em R$

fuel_price.description: Preço do litro de combustível em R$

tools.name: calculate_dividend_yield
tools.description: Calcula rendimento de dividendos — quanto precisa investir pra receber X por mês em dividendos de ações ou FIIs.

current_investment.description: Quanto já tem investido em R$

tools.name: calculate_markup
tools.description: Calcula preço de venda com markup — inclui custos fixos, variáveis e margem de lucro desejada.

unit_cost.description: Custo unitário do produto/serviço em R$

fixed_costs_percent.description: Custos fixos sobre o preço de venda (%)

tools.name: compare_loans
tools.description: Compara empréstimos de diferentes bancos pelo CET real (Custo Efetivo Total). Útil para portabilidade de crédito.

amount.description: Valor do empréstimo em R$

tools.name: simulate_income_tax
tools.description: Simula declaração de Imposto de Renda — compara modelo simplificado vs completo e calcula imposto devido ou restituição.

tax_withheld.description: IR já retido na fonte no ano em R$

health_expenses.description: Gastos com saúde no ano em R$

education_expenses.description: Gastos com educação no ano em R$ (limite R$ 3.561,50/pessoa)

pension_expenses.description: Previdência privada PGBL no ano em R$

tools.name: calculate_consorcio
tools.description: Simula consórcio — parcela mensal, custo total com taxa de administração, e comparação com financiamento.

asset_value.description: Valor do bem (carta de crédito) em R$

tools.name: compare_with_cdb
tools.description: Compara um CDB que rende X% do CDI vs alternativas (Tesouro Selic, LCI/LCA, poupança) usando o CDI atual do Banco Central. Retorna rendimento líquido pós-IR e diferença em R$ entre cada opção pra um aporte e prazo dados.

cdi_percent.description: Percentual do CDI que o CDB rende (ex: 110 = 110% do CDI; 100 = 100% do CDI)

lci_percent.description: Percentual do CDI da LCI/LCA pra incluir na comparação (opcional, ex: 95)

tools.name: get_cost_of_living
tools.description: Retorna custo de vida estimado em uma cidade brasileira — aluguel, alimentação, transporte, saúde, educação, lazer. Dados IBGE POF + estimativas 2026.

city.description: Nome da cidade (ex: 'São Paulo', 'Curitiba', 'Recife')

tools.name: get_average_salary
tools.description: Salário médio de uma profissão no Brasil em CLT (mediana, p25, p75, média) com base em dados reais do CAGED do Ministério do Trabalho. Aceita nome ('programador'), slug ('analistas-de-sistemas') ou código CBO 4 dígitos ('2124').

profession.description: Nome da profissão (ex: 'programador', 'enfermeiro', 'advogado'), slug ou CBO 4 dígitos

tools.name: list_top_professions
tools.description: Lista as profissões com maior volume de admissões formais no CAGED, ordenadas por número de contratações no período. Útil pra explorar quais famílias CBO têm dado disponível.

limit.description: Quantidade de profissões a retornar (1-100, default 20)

tools.name: get_current_rates
tools.description: Retorna taxas econômicas atuais do Brasil — Selic, CDI, IPCA, IGP-M, poupança, dólar, euro, salário mínimo.

tools.name: get_inss_table
tools.description: Retorna tabela de contribuição INSS 2026 com faixas e alíquotas progressivas.

tools.name: get_irpf_table
tools.description: Retorna tabela do Imposto de Renda Pessoa Física 2026 com faixas, alíquotas e parcelas de dedução.

tools.name: get_minimum_wage_history
tools.description: Retorna histórico do salário mínimo brasileiro de 1994 (Plano Real) até 2026.

tools.name: get_bank_holidays
tools.description: Retorna feriados nacionais do Brasil em 2026 com datas e dias da semana.

tools.name: get_rates_history
tools.description: Retorna série histórica de uma taxa econômica brasileira (Selic, CDI, IPCA, IGP-M, dólar, euro, salário mínimo). Dados oficiais do Banco Central — séries SGS. Permite filtrar por intervalo de datas e agregar em mensal/anual pra reduzir volume.

metric.description: Métrica desejada. selic/cdi/dollar/euro são diárias; ipca/ipcaMonthly/igpm/poupanca/minimumWage são mensais.

aggregate.description: Agregação: 'none' retorna pontos brutos, 'monthly' retorna 1 ponto/mês (último valor), 'yearly' retorna 1 ponto/ano.

limit.description: Limite de pontos retornados (default 500, max 2000)

tools.name: search_calculator
tools.description: Encontra a calculadora financeira mais relevante no Falazuki para um determinado tema.

tools.name: get_falazuki_info
tools.description: Informações sobre o Fala, Zuki! — assistente financeiro pessoal no WhatsApp. Preço, funcionalidades, como começar.

tools.name: advise_investment
tools.description: Recomenda tipo de investimento com base no perfil, prazo, valor e objetivo. Retorna opções rankeadas com prós e contras.

amount.description: Valor disponível para investir em R$

tools.name: advise_tax_regime
tools.description: Recomenda o melhor regime tributário — MEI, Simples Nacional, Lucro Presumido — com base no faturamento e atividade.

tools.name: compare_investments
tools.description: Compara rendimento líquido de diferentes investimentos lado a lado para o mesmo valor e prazo.

tools.name: get_iv_radar
tools.description:
Implied-volatility (IV) structure for a stock: how expensive options are,
    whether volatility is being squeezed, and whether traders are paying up for
    upside (calls) or downside (puts). Available to all signed-in users.

    Args:
        ticker: Stock symbol, e.g. "NVDA".
        refresh: Bypass the backend's fresh IV cache and request the latest
            option-chain pull. Defaults to

tools.name: get_monte_carlo
tools.description:
Monte Carlo price simulation for the next ~10 trading days: thousands of
    random price paths estimate a likely price range and the odds of finishing
    higher.

    Args:
        ticker: Stock symbol, e.g. "AAPL".

tools.name: get_ai_prediction
tools.description:
AI next-day prediction: probability the stock closes UP, a plain
    buy/watch/sell-lean signal, and how strongly the models agree (consensus).

    Available for any authenticated user's ticker.

    Args:
        ticker: Stock symbol, e.g. "TSLA".

tools.name: get_equity_curves
tools.description:
Backtest performance of the quant strategy across your watchlist:
    Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, win rate and total return per symbol.

    Args:
        ticker: Optional symbol to show just one row, e.g. "SPY". Leave blank for all.

tools.name: get_option_pressure
tools.description:
Option-chain pressure map for the nearest weekly/monthly expiry — Max
    Pain, dealer Gamma Wall, likely weekly high, and an extreme squeeze target.

    Args:
        ticker: Stock symbol, e.g. "SPY".

tools.name: analyze_stock
tools.description:
Aggregate all quant tools into one JSON stock analysis.

    The tool reuses the existing MCP tools as its data sources, then derives a
    direction signal, direction score, bullish factors, bearish factors and
    plain-English summary. If one underlying tool is gated, unavailable or
    raises an error, the remaining tools still contribute to the final result.

    Args:
        symbol: Stock s

tools.name: get_pretrade_risk_scan
tools.description:
Full pre-trade risk scan JSON for a stock.

    Args:
        symbol: Stock symbol, e.g. "NVDA".

tools.name: generate_stock_images
tools.description:
Generate stock-report PNG images and return their URLs.

    This is intentionally separate from analyze_stock so the JSON analysis stays
    fast and light. The backend reuses the same Growth Engine image generators
    used by email/social publishing.

    Args:
        symbol: Stock symbol, e.g. "RXRX".
        force: Regenerate images instead of using cached PNGs. Defaults to True

tools.name: generate_stock_research_report
tools.description:
Full markdown research report with five stock-report charts.

    Runs analyze_stock and stock-report image generation concurrently, then
    renders a presentation-ready markdown report (direction, direction score, bullish /
    bearish factors, source-tool status, and the five chart embeds). The markdown
    is returned for display and the same data is mirrored in structured JSON.

    Args:

tools.name: calculate_tdee
tools.description: Calculate TDEE (Total Daily Energy Expenditure), BMR, and personalised daily macro targets (protein, carbs, fat) based on the user's stats and goal. Use this when someone asks how many calories they should eat, what their maintenance calories are, or how to set up their macros.

activity_level.description: Activity level: sedentary | light | moderate | active | very_active

goal.description: Goal: lose weight | maintain weight | gain muscle/weight

tools.name: lookup_nutrition
tools.description: Look up the full nutritional profile (calories, protein, carbs, fat, fibre, and key micronutrients) for any food by name and serving size. Use this when someone asks about the nutrition or macros in a specific food.

food_name.description: Name of the food to look up (e.g. "chicken breast", "oats", "banana")

tools.name: generate_meal_plan
tools.description: Generate a full day meal plan (breakfast, lunch, snack, dinner) tailored to the user's calorie goal, dietary preference, and fitness goal. Use this when someone asks for a meal plan, what to eat for a goal, or how to structure their diet.

dietary_preference.description: Dietary style: standard | vegetarian | vegan | keto | high_protein

tools.name: fix_deficiency
tools.description: Get a detailed action plan to fix a specific nutritional deficiency — including the best foods to eat (with serving sizes), foods to avoid, supplement advice, and deficiency symptoms. Use this when someone asks how to increase a specific nutrient, what to eat for a deficiency, or what causes low levels of a nutrient.

nutrient.description: The nutrient to address. Supported: iron, calcium, vitamin_c, vitamin_d, magnesium, potassium, zinc, sodium, fiber, protein

gender.description: Biological sex — used to personalise RDI targets (default: unspecified)

age.description: Age in years — used to note lifecycle-specific considerations

tools.name: nutrition_score
tools.description: Calculate a nutrition quality score (0–100) for a day's eating based on macros and optional micronutrient data. Returns a breakdown by category, a letter grade, and actionable recommendations. Use this when someone wants to rate their diet, check if they're eating well, or get feedback on a day's meals.

vegetable_servings.description: Number of vegetable/fruit servings today — optional (1 serving = ~80g)

tools.name: workflow.run_pnl_planning
tools.description: Calculate net PnL, ROE, fees and gross profit/loss for a futures trade. Use when user asks "what's my profit/loss on this trade?" Returns: grossPnl, fees, netPnl, netPnlUsdt, roe (%).

tools.name: workflow.run_liquidation_safety
tools.description: Calculate the liquidation price for an isolated-margin futures position. Use when user asks "where will I get liquidated?" or "how close is my liq price?". Returns: liquidationPrice, distancePct (how far from entry).

tools.name: workflow.run_breakeven_planning
tools.description: Calculate the break-even exit price that covers all trading fees. Use when user asks "what price do I need to just break even?" Returns: breakevenPrice, totalFees.

tools.name: workflow.run_position_sizing
tools.description: Calculate the correct position size given a maximum risk in USDT and a stop-loss price. Use when user asks "how many coins should I buy?" or "size my position so I risk exactly $X". Returns: positionSize (base), positionUsdt, marginRequired.

tools.name: workflow.run_funding_cost
tools.description: Calculate the total funding cost (or income) for holding a perpetual futures position. Use when user asks "how much funding will I pay holding X days?" or "is funding eating my profit?". Returns: totalFundingUsdt (negative = you pay, positive = you receive), perIntervalUsdt.

fundingRate.description: Funding rate per 8h period as fraction, e.g. 0.0001

tools.name: primitive.average_entry
tools.description: Calculate the weighted average entry price from multiple buy/sell fills (DCA). Use when user has filled at multiple prices and asks "what's my average entry?" Returns: averagePrice, totalSize, totalCost.

tools.name: workflow.run_exit_target
tools.description: Calculate the exact exit price needed to hit a target PnL or ROE percentage. Use when user asks "at what price do I take profit to make $500?" or "where should I set TP for 20% ROE?". Returns: targetExitPrice.

tools.name: workflow.run_scenario_planning
tools.description: Run a scenario analysis: compute PnL for multiple price-change percentages at once. Use when user asks "show me my P&L if BTC moves -10%, -5%, +5%, +10%". Returns: array of { deltaPct, exitPrice, netPnl, roe }.

deltasPct.description: List of price change percentages, e.g. [-10, -5, 0, 5, 10]

tools.name: workflow.run_max_leverage
tools.description: Calculate the maximum safe leverage based on account size, max acceptable drawdown, and asset daily volatility. Use when user asks "what's the max leverage I should use on BTC?" or "how much leverage is safe given 3% daily volatility?". Returns: maxLeverage, marginAtRisk.

maxDrawdownPct.description: Maximum acceptable drawdown as percentage, e.g. 10 for 10%

volatilityPct.description: Expected daily price volatility as percentage, e.g. 3 for 3%

tools.name: primitive.hedge_ratio
tools.description: Calculate the short perpetual futures position size needed to hedge a spot holding. Use when user asks "how much should I short to hedge my BTC?" or "what margin do I need for a 100% hedge?". Returns: hedgeNotional, requiredMargin, estimatedFundingCost.

hedgeRatio.description: Percentage of spot to hedge, e.g. 100 for full hedge, 50 for half. Default 100.

leverage.description: Leverage on the perp short. Default 1.

fundingRatePct.description: Current 8h funding rate as percentage, e.g. 0.01. Used for cost estimate.

tools.name: workflow.run_funding_arbitrage
tools.description: Calculate funding rate arbitrage profit: annualized yield, net profit, and breakeven days for a long/short basis trade across two exchanges. Use when user asks "is this funding arb worth it?" or "how many days to break even on transfer fees?". Returns: netProfitUsdt, annualizedYieldPct, breakevenDays.

longFundingRate.description: Funding rate on long side (% per interval, positive = you pay)

shortFundingRate.description: Funding rate on short side (% per interval, positive = you receive)

transferFeePct.description: One-time transfer/setup fee as percentage, e.g. 0.1 for 0.1%

tools.name: workflow.run_compound_funding
tools.description: Project capital growth from reinvesting perpetual futures funding income (compounding carry). Use when user asks "how much will I make compounding 0.01% funding for 90 days?" or "what's my APY on this carry position?". Returns: finalCapital, totalEarned, apy, growthTable.

fundingRatePct.description: Funding rate per interval as percentage, e.g. 0.01 for 0.01%

reinvestPct.description: Percentage of earnings reinvested each interval. 100 = full compounding, 0 = no reinvestment. Default 100.

tools.name: workflow.run_pre_trade_check
tools.description: Full pre-trade decision card: orchestrates position sizing, breakeven, liquidation, and funding cost in one call. Use when user describes a full trade setup and asks "should I take this trade?" or "run the numbers on this setup". Provide exchange+symbol to fetch live funding rate automatically. Returns: positionSize, breakeven, liquidationPrice, fundingCost, overnightBreakevenShift, verdict.

exchange.description: Exchange code, e.g. "binance" or "bybit". Used to fetch live funding rate if funding_rate is omitted.

funding_rate.description: Funding rate per 8h as decimal, e.g. 0.0001. If omitted, fetched live from exchange.

hold_hours.description: Expected hold time in hours for overnight shift calc. Default 8.

tools.name: workflow.run_risk_reward
tools.description: Full risk:reward analysis — the single best tool when user describes a trade with entry, stop, and target. Calculates R:R ratio, position size, liquidation price, breakeven, and P&L at both stop and target. Returns a verdict: strong (3:1+) / good (2:1+) / marginal / poor. Use when user asks "is this trade worth taking?" or "what's my risk reward on this setup?".

tools.name: workflow.run_dca_entry
tools.description: DCA entry planner: weighted average entry price, breakeven, and per-level contribution from multiple fill prices and sizes. Use when user bought at several prices and asks "what's my average entry?" or "where is my DCA breakeven?". Returns: averageEntry, breakeven, per-level summary.

tools.name: workflow.run_scale_out
tools.description: Scale-out planner: P&L, ROI, and cumulative P&L for each partial exit level. Use when user wants to take profit at multiple targets — "close 30% at $90k, 30% at $95k, 40% at $100k — what's my total P&L?". Returns: per-level pnl, weightedAvgExitPrice, totalRoi.

total_size.description: Total position size in base currency

tools.name: workflow.run_carry_trade
tools.description: Delta-neutral carry trade (funding arbitrage) analysis. Use when user asks "is this carry trade worth it?" — long on exchange A, short on exchange B, collect the funding rate spread. Returns: netYieldPct, grossProfit, netProfit, breakevenDays, verdict (profitable/marginal/loss).

funding_rate_long.description: Funding rate on long exchange per interval (decimal)

funding_rate_short.description: Funding rate on short exchange per interval (decimal)

tools.name: workflow.run_funding_breakeven
tools.description: Price move needed to cover funding cost + fees over a holding period. Use when user asks "how much does BTC need to move for me to profit after funding?" or "is funding killing my edge on this trade?". Returns: breakevenWithFunding, breakevenWithoutFunding, requiredMovePct.

tools.name: system.verify
tools.description: Run the full regression suite — 22 canonical test vectors across all 12 calculators — and return a pass/fail report with counts and timestamp. Call this before using results in production workflows to confirm the computation layer is operating correctly.

tools.name: explain_price_change
tools.description: Analyzes and explains the driving factors behind an NSE stock's price movement over a specific timeframe. It synthesizes recent financial news, entity-level sentiment scores, and technical indicators to provide a comprehensive narrative of market behavior.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol on the National Stock Exchange of India (e.g., RELIANCE, TCS).

start_date.description: The start date of the analysis period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date of the analysis period in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: analyze_stock_enhanced
tools.description: Generates a deep, AI-driven single-stock research report. Combines historical price data, moving averages, and news sentiment into a structured analysis to evaluate the overall health and momentum of the equity.

symbol.description: The stock ticker symbol on the National Stock Exchange of India (e.g., INFY, HDFCBANK).

start_date.description: The start date for data collection in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date for data collection in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: compare_stocks
tools.description: Performs a side-by-side quantitative and qualitative comparison of two NSE stocks. Useful for pair trading analysis or sector peer evaluation based on price performance and media sentiment.

symbol1.description: The primary stock ticker symbol (e.g., TATAMOTORS).

symbol2.description: The secondary stock ticker symbol for comparison (e.g., MARUTI).

start_date.description: The start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

end_date.description: The end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: get_stock_summary
tools.description: Fetches fundamental price metrics and recent performance summaries for an NSE-listed stock. Returns the latest closing price, percentage change, daily high/low, and trading volume.

period_days.description: The number of days to look back for the summary metrics (e.g., 7, 30, 90).

tools.name: get_historical_prices
tools.description: Retrieves the daily Open, High, Low, Close, and Volume (OHLCV) time-series data for an Indian equity. Essential for charting and custom technical analysis.

start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: get_news_sentiment
tools.description: Fetches recent financial news articles specifically mentioning the target Indian stock, complete with proprietary NLP sentiment scores (ranging from strongly negative to strongly positive) for each article.

start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: get_sentiment_aggregate
tools.description: Calculates the aggregated market mood and sentiment statistics for an NSE stock over a specified period. Useful for tracking sentiment shifts over time.

start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: get_technical_analysis
tools.description: Calculates and returns key technical indicators for an NSE stock, including Relative Strength Index (RSI), Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD), Bollinger Bands, and support/resistance levels.

period_days.description: The lookback period in days for calculating the indicators (standard is 14 for RSI).

tools.name: calculate_correlation
tools.description: Computes the Pearson correlation coefficient between the daily returns of two NSE stocks over a specific period to measure their statistical relationship.

start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD).

tools.name: get_rag_evidence
tools.description: Performs a semantic search over the Sentimatix financial news corpus. Retrieves specific quotes and evidence related to a query for a particular NSE stock to ground AI responses in factual reporting.

query.description: The natural language question or topic to search the news corpus for (e.g., 'Q3 earnings report results').

tools.name: get_economic_series
tools.description:
Preferred analyst-facing retrieval tool for curated ABS/RBA economic concepts.

Use list_economic_concepts for discovery. Date bounds accept YYYY, YYYY-QN,
YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD and are normalised to the resolved source.

variant.description: Optional curated concept variant, such as headline, underlying, or target.

geography.description: Optional geography selector for a curated concept, usually aus for Australia.

frequency.description: Optional requested frequency for a curated concept, such as monthly, quarterly, or annual.

start.description: Optional analyst-friendly date bound: YYYY, YYYY-QN, YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD. Semantic retrieval normalises this to the resolved source frequency.

end.description: Optional analyst-friendly date bound: YYYY, YYYY-QN, YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD. Semantic retrieval normalises this to the resolved source frequency.

last_n.description: Optional limit returning only the most recent N observations per series; metadata.truncated is true when older observations were dropped.

include_observation_dimensions.description: Whether to repeat the full dimension dict on every observation. Off by default because the same dimensions already appear on each series descriptor and are encoded in series_id.

tools.name: get_derived_series
tools.description:
Read-only retrieval for the narrow transparent derived series layer.

Date bounds accept YYYY, YYYY-QN, YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD and
are normalised to the derived series frequency.

start.description: Optional analyst-friendly bound for a derived series: YYYY, YYYY-QN, YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD. Bounds are normalised to the derived series frequency.

end.description: Optional analyst-friendly bound for a derived series: YYYY, YYYY-QN, YYYY-SN, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD. Bounds are normalised to the derived series frequency.

last_n.description: Optional limit returning only the most recent N observations per series; metadata.truncated is true when older observations were dropped.

Source-aware convenience wrapper for the latest observations.

resolves one series; pass series_ids=[...] to narrow a broad dataset instead of
returning every series it contains.

returning every series it contains.

tools.name: token_get_by_uuid
tools.description: Get a single token by its TokenBel internal identifier (field name: uuid). Tokens are TokenBel-native tokenized corporate securities on fintech platforms (fainex/finstore/bynex/whitebird), not BCSE-listed tickers. Returns platform, lifecycle status, pricing, coupon rate, and company info.

uuid.description: TokenBel internal identifier: opaque hexadecimal string, usually 8 characters such as "78c7e502"; despite uuid field/tool names, it is not an RFC UUID and normally has no hyphens. Token id, usually discovered via token_list.

tools.name: token_list
tools.description: List active tokens with optional filtering by fintech platform and token lifecycle status. Tokens do not have tickers; use this list tool to browse tokenized securities by platform/status. Supports cursor-based pagination.

limit.description: Max results (1-1000, default 50)

cursor_uuid.description: TokenBel internal identifier: opaque hexadecimal string, usually 8 characters such as "78c7e502"; despite uuid field/tool names, it is not an RFC UUID and normally has no hyphens. Pagination cursor id from next_cursor before the | delimiter.

platform.description: Filter by tokenization platform: fainex, finstore, bynex, or whitebird.

status.description: Filter by token lifecycle status: SELL_NOT_STARTED (sale not open yet), SELL_IN_PROGRESS (currently selling), SELL_SUSPENDED (sale paused), SOLD_OUT (fully sold), SELL_ENDED (sale ended), CIRCULATION_ENDED (matured/circulation ended), OBLIGATIONS_COMPLETED (issuer obligations completed).

tools.name: share_get_by_uuid
tools.description: Get a single BCSE exchange-listed share by its TokenBel internal identifier (field name: uuid). Returns ticker, issuer_uuid/issuer_name, share_kind (common/preferred), nominal value, lot size, and is_trading (traded today, not historical liquidity). Use search_by_ticker first when starting from a ticker.

uuid.description: TokenBel internal identifier: opaque hexadecimal string, usually 8 characters such as "78c7e502"; despite uuid field/tool names, it is not an RFC UUID and normally has no hyphens. Share id, usually discovered via search_by_ticker.

tools.name: share_list
tools.description: List active BCSE exchange-listed shares with optional filtering by securities issuer TokenBel internal id (parameter name: issuer_uuid) and today-trading flag. Use issuer_uuid from search_by_name results where entity_type="issuer". Supports cursor-based pagination.

issuer_uuid.description: TokenBel internal identifier: opaque hexadecimal string, usually 8 characters such as "78c7e502"; despite uuid field/tool names, it is not an RFC UUID and normally has no hyphens. Filter by security_issuer id from search_by_name result with entity_type="issuer".

is_trading.description: Filter by is_traded_today flag: true means traded today, not historical liquidity

tools.name: currency_rate_get
tools.description: Get NBRB (National Bank of Belarus) official FX rates against BYN (Belarusian ruble) for USD, EUR, and/or RUB. Rates are BYN per 1 unit of foreign currency. Modes: latest (no dates), single_date (date), range (date_from/date_to, either bound optional), or grouped weekly/monthly aggregates (group_by + range). Only usd/eur/rub are supported; BYN is the implicit base currency.

currency.description: Filter to one supported foreign currency: usd, eur, or rub. Omit to return all three. BYN is the base currency, not a target.

date_from.description: Range start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (inclusive). Can be omitted for open-start range.

date_to.description: Range end date in YYYY-MM-DD format (inclusive, >= date_from). Open-ended or today-bounded ranges bypass cache.

group_by.description: Aggregate by week or month. Requires a date range (date_from/date_to), not a single date.

uuid.description: TokenBel internal identifier: opaque hexadecimal string, usually 8 characters such as "78c7e502"; despite uuid field/tool names, it is not an RFC UUID and normally has no hyphens. Listed share or bond id, usually discovered via search_by_ticker.

date_to.description: Range end date YYYY-MM-DD (inclusive, >= date_from). Provide both date_from and date_to for range mode; ranges ending today bypass cache.
